subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast fixed thy gaze upon the Kingdom of Glory! The splendour of the Beauty of the world illumined the whole earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت جلال پرتو جمال آفاق عالم را نورانی نمود و فیض رحمانی مبذول
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight
